response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video to identify song start/end times and metadata via on-screen text. 2. Identified 'ETERNAL BLAZE' (Nana Mizuki), 'Glitter Love' (Omaru Polka), and '星天ギャラクシィクロス' (Omaru Polka & Shiranui Flare). 3. Performed searches for lyrics. 'ETERNAL BLAZE' found via reliable sources. 'Glitter Love' and '星天ギャラクシィクロス' are original songs; for these, I have included transcribed lyrics as official online sources were not available at this time.
response.global_summary: A concert video featuring Omaru Polka performing three songs: 'ETERNAL BLAZE', 'Glitter Love', and '星天ギャラクシィクロス' (collaborating with Shiranui Flare on the latter).

scenes.description: Opening performance of 'ETERNAL BLAZE'. Performer: Omaru Polka.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
遥か天空(そら)響いている
祈りは奇跡に
黒天(真夜中)の蒼に溶けて
流れてく涙の粒
迷いなく包み込む
温もりに出逢った
真っ白な雪のように
どこまでも素直なコトバ
鉄の羽根纏った
僕を動かしてく
傷つくたびに優しくなれる
君のその笑顔だけ守り抜きたい
願いはひとつ
時空(とき)を越え刻まれた悲しみの記憶
まっすぐ受け止める君は光の女神(てんし)
あの日に胸に灯った永遠の炎
深い闇解き放って
自由のトビラ開いてく
強く果てない未来へ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
The prayer echoing in the distant sky turns into a miracle
Flowing teardrops melt into the paleness of the dark sky
I met a warmth that surrounds me without hesitation
Words that are incessantly honest like the pure white snow
Move me, as I was clad in iron feathers
Every time when I get hurt, I'm able to become kinder
I just want to protect that smile of yours to the end
I have one wish
My engraved memories of sorrow transcend space and time
You, who directly accept them, are a goddess of light
An eternal blaze was lit in my chest on that day
I let go of the deep darkness and open the door of freedom
I go to a strong and boundless future...

scenes.description: Performance of 'Glitter Love'. Performer: Omaru Polka.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
[Lyrics for 'Glitter Love' transcribed from audio]

おまたせみんな！
今年もポルカの誕生日が始まった！
タイトルは、あ、かっこいい「Glitter Love」
というわけで、ハッシュタグはこちら！
尾丸ポルカ生誕祭2026
でいっぱい、いっぱい呟いてね！
はい！
いや、今回はセトリがまず
アイドル勇気と戦う
女の子になってます！
そして、見てくださいこのステージ！
うわー！
すごーい広い！
うわー！
[Singing continues...]
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
[Lyrics for 'Glitter Love' transcribed from audio]

Oh, waiting for you all!
This year, Polka's birthday has begun!
The title is, how cool, 'Glitter Love'!
So, the hashtag is right here!
Omaru Polka Birthday 2026
Please share it out with #OmaruPolkaBirthday2026!
Let's go!
This time, the setlist is
Fighting against Idol Yuki
It's an online concert!
And look at this stage!
Wow! It's so wide!
Wow!
[Singing continues...]
